qqconnect-desc: Allow users to log in to MediaWiki using a QQ account via QQ Connect (QQ互联) OAuth2.
qqconnect-loginbutton-help: Log in using your QQ account
qqconnect-special-login-intro: You are logging in with your QQ account.
qqconnect-test-mode-body: QQ Connect login is currently in '''test mode'''. The login button is shown so that the QQ Connect platform can review your application, but actual QQ login is not enabled yet. A site administrator must configure the APP ID and APP KEY in LocalSettings.php, and set $wgQQConnectTestMode = false; to enable real QQ login. See the [[Special:QQConnect|QQ account management page]] or the extension documentation for details.
qqconnect-error-not-configured: QQ Connect is not configured. Ask a site administrator to set $wgQQConnectAppId and $wgQQConnectAppKey.
qqconnect-error-invalid-state: Invalid or expired login session. Please try logging in with QQ again.
qqconnect-error-no-code: No authorization code was received from QQ. Please try again.
qqconnect-error-token: Failed to obtain an access token from QQ. Please try again.
qqconnect-error-openid: Failed to obtain your QQ OpenID. Please try again.
qqconnect-error-userinfo: Failed to retrieve your QQ user information. Please try again.
qqconnect-error-openid-bound-other: This QQ account is already bound to another MediaWiki user.
qqconnect-error-user-bound-other: Your account is already bound to a different QQ. Use the management page to change it.
qqconnect-error-bind-failed: Failed to bind the QQ account. Please try again.
qqconnect-error-auth-failed: Authentication failed. Please check your username and password.
qqconnect-error-already-bound: This QQ account is already bound to your account.
qqconnect-error-require-bind: You must bind a QQ account to your user before you can edit pages. Go to [[Special:QQConnect|your QQ account management page]] to bind.
qqconnect-choose-intro: Your QQ account ($1) is not yet linked to a MediaWiki account. Choose how to continue:
qqconnect-choose-create-desc: Register a new MediaWiki account using the normal registration process. Your QQ will be bound automatically after registration.
qqconnect-choose-link: Link to an existing MediaWiki account
qqconnect-choose-link-desc: Bind this QQ to an existing MediaWiki account by verifying the account credentials.
qqconnect-link-form-intro: Enter the credentials of the MediaWiki account you want to bind to QQ account "$1".
qqconnect-special-manage-intro: Manage the QQ account bound to your MediaWiki account.
qqconnect-manage-bound: Your account is bound to the following QQ account:
qqconnect-manage-not-bound: Your account is not currently bound to any QQ account.
qqconnect-manage-bind-success: Your QQ account has been bound successfully.
qqconnect-manage-unbind-success: Your QQ account has been unbound successfully.
qqconnect-manage-rebind-success: Your QQ account has been changed successfully.
qqconnect-manage-confirm-unbind: Are you sure you want to unbind your QQ account? You will not be able to log in with QQ until you bind again.
qqconnect-special-admin-intro: View and manage QQ bindings for all users.
qqconnect-prefs-not-bound: Not bound to a QQ account.
qqconnect-log-desc: Events related to QQ account binding.
qqconnect-logentry-bind: bound their MediaWiki account to a QQ account
qqconnect-logentry-unbind: unbound their MediaWiki account from a QQ account
qqconnect-logentry-rebind: changed the QQ account bound to their MediaWiki account
